mentions.note: First Ukrainian defense tech startup; Pentagon contract selection process ongoing. One of three best drone plays recommended alongside Redcat and Axon; federal contracts likely for multiple companies.

IPO'd $5, opened $12.50, rallied $65, now $26. Great story (Ukrainian autonomous drone-swarm software, Eric Prince as chairman) but financials premature: $310k revenue, $8.5M+ loss, valued 16x sales. Expect major dilution. Keep an eye on signed contract execution; too early to buy.
